meaning: adj.鍔ㄩ潤鑴夌殑,杩炴帴鍔ㄩ潤鑴夌殑
examples: Arteriovenous anastomoses are best developed in the digits.
Cerebral aneurysm and arteriovenous malformation are frequent disease of cerebral vessels.
Standard arteriovenous graft access requires 2 weeks before cannulation to avoid complications from early access.
The condition involves a kind of tangle in the brain called an arteriovenous malformation, or AVM.
